title: Slime Mold
description: A Physarum polycephalum simulation: thousands of agents sense and deposit a chemoattractant trail that diffuses and decays, self-organizing into the reticulated yellow vein network of real slime mould. It grows outward from the center — click to drop food the colony reaches toward. Sensor angle/distance, turn, persistence, and growth are live and audio-mappable; randomized each load.
